"'''The Void Terror'''" is a standalone solitaire adventure written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] and reprinted in [[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]].

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}
